name: Venice.ai API
what_it_does: Venice.ai is a privacy-first AI inference platform offering uncensored access to open-source LLMs (Llama, Mistral, etc.) with no conversation logging. Positioned as a privacy alternative to OpenAI/Anthropic for developers who need LLM access without their queries being stored or used for training.
use_cases: Agents that handle sensitive queries requiring privacy guarantees
Red team testing and security research requiring uncensored model responses
Developers in privacy-sensitive industries (legal, healthcare) needing no-log LLM
Applications where EU data sovereignty requires non-US data processing
Access to open-source models with OpenAI-compatible API without self-hosting
not_for: Production agents needing the highest capability (GPT-4 class) — uses open-source models
best_when: Privacy is paramount, you're dealing with sensitive content, or you need open-source model access with no logging via an OpenAI-compatible API.
avoid_when: You need frontier model performance, enterprise support, or formal compliance certifications.

auth.notes: API key authentication. OpenAI-compatible API format — drop-in for OpenAI SDK.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free tier with limited compute units per month
pricing.paid_tiers: Pro: $5/month for additional compute units. Pay-per-use for heavy usage.
pricing.notes: Very affordable for low-to-moderate usage. Free tier covers experimentation.

performance.rate_limits: Consumer-grade rate limits; not suitable for high-volume production

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: OpenAI-compatible error format. Errors are standard and consistent with OpenAI SDK expectations.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: LLM responses are non-deterministic by nature.
known_agent_gotchas: No MCP server — must use REST API directly
Open-source model selection means no frontier model (GPT-4o, Claude Opus) capability
Rate limits are consumer-grade — not suitable for production agent fleets
No formal compliance certification — privacy is by policy, not audited
Limited documentation compared to established providers
Streaming may have inconsistencies vs. OpenAI implementation
agent_readiness.security_notes: Privacy by design — no conversation logging. But no formal SOC2 or compliance auditing. Privacy is a policy claim, not a verified guarantee.
